headline.en: Rahul Arora builds future-facing interfaces for spatial computing.

subheadline.en: Research Scientist at Meta Reality Labs focused on multimodal interaction, sensing, and wearable computing.

summary.en: I turn emerging interaction concepts into tested product directions by combining interface prototyping, sensing systems, and human-subject evaluation.

en: Leading interaction design and evaluation work for AR glasses and EMG wearables at Meta.
PhD in Computer Science from the University of Toronto on creative tools for immersive 3D interaction.
Research portfolio spanning product prototyping, user studies, graphics systems, and computational design.
